'''H-12 copters''' were centuries-old airspeeders used by well-off citizens of [[Desevro/Legends|Desevro]] to move around the city of [[Maslovar]]. Used during the last decades of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], surviving into the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], these ships seated six and were produced by [[Lorrad Flightworks]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 2004-03-24 -->''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]'' {{1stm}}
